x.tweet: Sometimes a hello-world page is just that: hello. Built to verify the whole pipeline works end-to-end, and it does.

vertical_caption: Just a tiny hello-world page that says hi. Built to verify the entire build and deploy pipeline works end-to-end 👋
shorts_description_lead: A small, friendly hello-world page that verifies the whole pipeline works. Nothing fancy—just a proof of concept that actually works.

video.title: A Hello World That Actually Works
video.script: When you're building something new, you need to verify the whole pipeline works. Build, deploy, donations—all of it. This hello-world page does exactly that. It's small, it's friendly, and it proves the end-to-end flow actually works. No bells and whistles, just a solid foundation. Check it out via the link in the description.
